scenes.voice_text: Did you know Merab Dvalishvili beat the same champion twice in one calendar year?

He took Sean O’Malley’s belt with a wrestling clinic at UFC 306 in 2024, then in 2025 defended it three times: smothered Umar Nurmagomedov in January, choked O’Malley unconscious with a north-south choke in June, and outworked Cory Sandhagen in October.
That’s three successful title defenses in ten months, a UFC record of 117 takedowns landed, and a 14-fight win streak that’s still running.
Merab “The Machine” is now 21-4 overall, top-3 P4P, and nobody has solved his cardio or wrestling yet.
He’s going for a fourth defense this year at UFC 323 on December 7 against Petr Yan. You buying Merab as the bantamweight GOAT already?
